title: Agent chat message list component with timeline grouping and citation rendering
purpose: Displays a timeline of agent messages, tool calls, permissions, and thinking blocks with proper grouping, citation handling, and streaming indicators.
module_context: Exports a MessageList component that renders agent chat history with support for grouped tool calls, citation chips, streaming indicators, and various message types including permissions and thinking blocks.

steps.content: Parse the input text to identify citation markers and separate text segments.
IF no citation markers are found, render the entire text as markdown.
ELSE render each text segment as markdown and each citation marker as an interactive chip.
Filter the timeline to include only tool call items.
Map each tool call item to extract its id and name for reference.
IF the message role is user, return the user avatar kind.
ELSE check if the message has an origin tag and return it if present.
ELSE return the main agent avatar kind as default.
Initialize a state to track whether the grouped row is expanded.
Determine the label text based on the group type and item count.
Render a toggle button to expand or collapse the grouped items.
IF the group is expanded, render each tool call item in the group.
Extract thinking blocks, current turn ID, and usage data from the agent store.
IF the timeline is empty, render a message indicating no messages yet.
Collect tool call references from the timeline for citation parsing.
Group the timeline items for efficient rendering.
Identify the last assistant message in each turn for footer placement.
Render each timeline entry based on its type, handling grouped reads, compaction notices, thinking blocks, permissions, and tool calls.
For assistant messages, render associated thinking blocks and apply appropriate styling.
